cases.name: array_binary_protocol_test-1
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE array_test (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            bool_array BOOLEAN[],
            int2_array SMALLINT[],
            int4_array INTEGER[],
            int8_array BIGINT[],
            float4_array REAL[],
            float8_array DOUBLE PRECISION[],
            text_array TEXT[],
            varchar_array VARCHAR(50)[],
            numeric_array NUMERIC(10,2)[]
        )

cases.name: array_binary_protocol_test-2
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO array_test (id, bool_array, int2_array, int4_array, int8_array, float4_array, float8_array, text_array, varchar_array, numeric_array)
        VALUES (
            1,
            ARRAY[true, false, true],
            ARRAY[1, 2, 3],
            ARRAY[100, 200, 300],
            ARRAY[1000000, 2000000, 3000000],
            ARRAY[1.5, 2.5, 3.5],
            ARRAY[1.111, 2.222, 3.333],
            ARRAY['hello', 'world', 'test'],
            ARRAY['varchar1', 'varchar2', 'varchar3'],
            ARRAY[123.45, 678.90, 999.99]
        )

cases.name: array_binary_protocol_test-3
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE array_null_test (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            int_array_with_nulls INTEGER[]
        )

cases.name: array_binary_protocol_test-4
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO array_null_test (id, int_array_with_nulls)
        VALUES (1, '[1, null, 3]'::INTEGER[])

cases.name: array_binary_protocol_test-5
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE empty_array_test (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            empty_int_array INTEGER[],
            empty_text_array TEXT[]
        )

cases.name: array_binary_protocol_test-6
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO empty_array_test (id, empty_int_array, empty_text_array)
        VALUES (1, ARRAY[]::INTEGER[], ARRAY[]::TEXT[])

cases.name: array_operators_test-1
cases.sql: SELECT tags[1] FROM products WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_operators_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT id, name FROM products WHERE 'portable' = ANY(tags)

cases.name: array_operators_test-3
cases.sql: SELECT id, name FROM products WHERE 5 < ALL(SELECT length(value) FROM json_each(tags))

cases.name: array_operators_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT id, name FROM products WHERE tags @> '["electronics", "portable"]'

cases.name: array_operators_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT id, name FROM products WHERE tags <@ '["electronics", "computers", "portable", "desktop", "mobile"]'

cases.name: array_operators_test-6
cases.sql:
SELECT p.name, c.name 
         FROM products p, categories c 
         WHERE p.tags && c.subcategories

cases.name: array_operators_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT tags || '["new-tag"]' AS combined FROM products WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_operators_test-8
cases.sql: SELECT array_length(numbers, 1) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_operators_test-9
cases.sql: SELECT array_upper(numbers, 1), array_lower(numbers, 1) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_operators_test-10
cases.sql: SELECT array_ndims(matrix) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_operators_test-11
cases.sql: SELECT array_append(numbers, 6) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_operators_test-12
cases.sql: SELECT array_prepend(0, numbers) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_operators_test-13
cases.sql: SELECT array_cat(numbers, '[6, 7, 8]') FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_operators_test-14
cases.sql: SELECT array_remove(numbers, 3) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_operators_test-15
cases.sql: SELECT array_replace(numbers, 3, 99) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_operators_test-16
cases.sql: SELECT array_position(numbers, 3) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_operators_test-17
cases.sql: SELECT array_positions('[1, 2, 3, 2, 4, 2]', 2)

cases.name: array_operators_test-18
cases.sql: SELECT array_agg(DISTINCT product ORDER BY product) AS products FROM sales

cases.name: array_operators_test-19
cases.sql:
SELECT product, array_agg(amount) AS amounts 
         FROM sales 
         GROUP BY product 
         ORDER BY product

cases.name: array_operators_test-20
cases.sql: SELECT data_values[2:5] AS slice FROM test_data WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_operators_test-21
cases.sql: SELECT value FROM unnest('["first", "second", "third"]') AS t

cases.name: array_operators_test-22
cases.sql: SELECT value, ordinality FROM unnest('["first", "second", "third"]') WITH ORDINALITY AS t ORDER BY ordinality

cases.name: array_operators_test-23
cases.sql: SELECT value FROM unnest('["a", "b", "c", "d"]') WITH ORDINALITY AS t WHERE ordinality > 2

cases.name: array_concat_test-1
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE test_arrays (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
                tags TEXT[],
                numbers INTEGER[],
                items_list TEXT[],
                category_names TEXT[]
            )

cases.name: array_concat_test-2
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO test_arrays (id, tags, numbers, items_list, category_names) VALUES 
                (1, '{tag1,tag2}', '{1,2,3}', '{item1,item2}', '{cat1,cat2}'),
                (2, '{tag3,tag4}', '{4,5,6}', '{item3,item4}', '{cat3,cat4}')

cases.name: array_concat_test-3
cases.sql: SELECT '{a,b}' || '{c,d}' AS concat_result

cases.name: array_concat_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT tags || '{new_tag}' AS extended_tags FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_concat_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT tags || category_names AS all_tags FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_concat_test-6
cases.sql: SELECT '{a,b}' || tags AS combined FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_concat_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT 'hello' || ' world' AS greeting

cases.name: array_concat_test-8
cases.sql: SELECT 'id_' || id::TEXT AS prefixed_id FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_concat_test-9
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE test_concat (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
                tags_array TEXT[],
                items TEXT[]
            )

cases.name: array_concat_test-10
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO test_concat (id, tags_array, items) VALUES 
                (1, '{tag1,tag2}', '{item1,item2}')

cases.name: array_concat_test-11
cases.sql: SELECT tags_array || items AS combined_data FROM test_concat

cases.name: array_concat_test-12
cases.sql: SELECT '{extra}' || tags_array AS final_tags FROM test_concat

cases.name: array_concat_test-13
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE test_funcs (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
                base_array TEXT[]
            )

cases.name: array_concat_test-14
cases.sql: INSERT INTO test_funcs (id, base_array) VALUES (1, '{a,b}')

cases.name: array_concat_test-15
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE naming_test (
                user_tags TEXT[],
                item_ids INTEGER[],
                categories TEXT[],
                keywords TEXT[],
                elements TEXT[],
                values_list TEXT[],
                name_array TEXT[],
                simple_string TEXT
            )

cases.name: array_concat_test-16
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO naming_test VALUES 
                ('{tag1}', '{1,2}', '{cat1}', '{kw1}', '{el1}', '{val1}', '{name1}', 'text')

cases.name: array_concat_test-17
cases.sql: SELECT simple_string || ' suffix' FROM naming_test

cases.name: array_concat_test-18
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE array_syntax_test (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
                int_array INTEGER[],
                text_array TEXT[]
            )

cases.name: array_concat_test-19
cases.sql:
INSERT INTO array_syntax_test (id, int_array, text_array) VALUES 
                (1, '{1,2,3}', '{a,b,c}'),
                (2, '{4,5,6}', '{d,e,f}')

cases.name: array_concat_test-20
cases.sql: SELECT '{1,2}' || '{3,4}' AS combined

cases.name: array_concat_test-21
cases.sql: SELECT '{0}' || int_array AS prepended FROM array_syntax_test WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_concat_test-22
cases.sql: SELECT text_array || '{z}' AS appended FROM array_syntax_test WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_concat_test-23
cases.sql: SELECT '{prefix}' || text_array AS wrapped FROM array_syntax_test WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_types_test-1
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE test_array_types (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            numbers INTEGER[],
            names TEXT[],
            matrix INTEGER[][]
        )

cases.name: array_types_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT int_array, text_array FROM array_data WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_types_test-3
cases.sql: SELECT int_array FROM array_data WHERE id = 3

cases.name: array_types_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT ARRAY[1,2,3]

cases.name: array_types_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT '{1,2,3}'::integer[]

cases.name: array_types_test-6
cases.sql: SELECT json_array_length(data) FROM array_ops WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_types_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT json_extract(data, '$[0]') FROM array_ops WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_types_test-8
cases.sql: SELECT json_extract(data, '$[1]') FROM array_ops WHERE id = 2

cases.name: array_types_test-9
cases.sql:
SELECT id, name FROM products 
         WHERE json_extract(tags, '$') LIKE '%electronics%'

cases.name: array_types_test-10
cases.sql:
SELECT id, name FROM products 
         WHERE json_extract(tags, '$[0]') = 'electronics'

cases.name: array_types_test-11
cases.sql: SELECT id FROM products WHERE 'electronics' = ANY(tags)

cases.name: array_types_test-12
cases.sql:
SELECT json_group_array(value) as value_array 
         FROM measurements 
         WHERE sensor_id = 1

cases.name: array_types_test-13
cases.sql:
SELECT sensor_id, json_group_array(value) as value_array 
         FROM measurements 
         GROUP BY sensor_id 
         ORDER BY sensor_id

cases.name: array_types_test-14
cases.sql: SELECT array_agg(value) FROM measurements WHERE sensor_id = 1

cases.name: array_types_test-15
cases.sql: SELECT json_extract(matrix, '$[0][0]') as elem FROM matrix_data WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_types_test-16
cases.sql: SELECT json_extract(matrix, '$[1][2]') as elem FROM matrix_data WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_types_test-17
cases.sql: SELECT json_array_length(matrix) as rows FROM matrix_data WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_types_test-18
cases.sql: SELECT json_extract(data, '$[1]') FROM nullable_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_types_test-19
cases.sql: SELECT data FROM nullable_arrays WHERE id = 3

cases.name: array_types_test-20
cases.sql: SELECT json_array_length(data) FROM nullable_arrays WHERE id = 1

cases.name: array_types_test-21
cases.sql: SELECT value FROM json_each((SELECT items FROM array_table WHERE id = 1))

cases.name: array_types_test-22
cases.sql:
SELECT a.id, je.value 
         FROM array_table a, json_each(a.items) je 
         ORDER BY a.id, je.value
